productDisplayName: Belmonte Men Bright Assorted Copper Cufflinks
description: Understated yet elegant, this pair of rosegold cuff links from belmonte offers a refined finish to a formal shirt. This small accessory has a big impact on the look of a suit a perfect accompaniment for shirts in shades of pink, black, purple and grey.Width: 1.5 cmRound cuff links made of steel, with a steel and black enamel designHinged back to hold the cuff link in place
